suggestion.suspectedRootCause: 设置首页 TopLevelSettings 刷新 dashboard 时同步刷新 SettingsList 阻塞主线程,单帧(frame=42)刷新耗时 186ms,远超 16ms 帧预算,导致 Choreographer 连续跳过 19 帧而明显掉帧。根因集中在 packages/apps/Settings/src/com/android/settings/homepage/TopLevelSettings.kt 与 DashboardFragment 的列表刷新逻辑;因日志含 Choreographer skipped frames,按 system-map flow settings_home_jank 的 escalation 规则需同步 framework 组复核是否存在主线程/system_server 关联阻塞。

duplicate.reason: 与 HIST-SET-001 同标题『设置首页滑动卡顿』、同正文(快速滑动掉帧且日志含 SettingsList refresh timeout)、同模块 settings、同路径 TopLevelSettings.kt、同优先级 P1;且 duplicate-pairs.yaml 中 HIST-SET-014/HIST-SET-051 均以此为 primary,属同一根因的重复缺陷。

evidenceRefs.note: system-map flow settings_home_jank.primary 与 routing-rules/settings 路径命中,owner=settings/yangliang2
标题/正文/路径/模块完全一致,duplicate primary
